__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=The Knotted Pistol,Ghanta,George VI's Speech,Cupid and Psyche,The Final Communique,Earth Magnetic Field
|rank=blue
|amount=6
|category=minion
|description=Per 10 Dragon Minions in battle: Troop HARD Stats +9
}}
[[Category:Minion]]
[[Category:Dragon Minion HARD Boost]]
